title: Light Italian Corn Arepa
description: A herbal, light post-workout Italian dish featuring corn arepa filled with fresh mozzarella and herbs. Perfect for gluten-free diets.
instructions: Combine cornmeal and 1/4 cup water in a bowl. Let rest 5 minutes.
Heat a small pan over medium heat. Add cornmeal mixture and cook until golden.
While cooking, blend fresh mozzarella with a pinch of salt and 1 tbsp basil.
Place mozzarella mixture in the center of the corn arepa. Serve warm.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
